name: Launch Announcement
subject: AI Command Centre HQ is live — your autonomous agent fleet is ready
preview_text: Deploy 27 AI agents that run your ops 24/7. Solo $49/mo.
body:
Your AI operations team is ready to deploy.

Hi {{first_name}},

AI Command Centre HQ is now live. It's a platform where autonomous AI agents run your business operations — monitoring, growth, research, competitive intel, revenue tracking — around the clock.

Not chatbots. Not copilots. Agents that observe, decide, and act.

Solo
$49/mo
5 agents, live dashboard, core monitoring. Built for solopreneurs.		 Team POPULAR
$149/mo
15 agents, RivalRadar, Revenue Engine, multi-user.		 Enterprise
$499/mo
Unlimited agents, custom builds, dedicated infra, SLA.

Get Started Now

Here's what happens when you sign up:

  1. Your Command Centre goes live — a real-time dashboard showing every agent and what it's doing.
  2. Core agents spin up immediately — Sysmon, AlertWatch, and PolicyPro start working within seconds.
  3. You watch, don't manage — agents run autonomously. You intervene only when you want to.

Reply to this email if you have questions. A human reads every one.

— The Second Mind Team

name: Value Proof
subject: Here's what your AI agents did in the last 48 hours
preview_text: Your fleet has been running autonomously — here's the recap.
body:
Your agents have been busy.

Hi {{first_name}},

Since you signed up, your AI fleet has been running autonomously. Here's what happened:

Sysmon — Monitored CPU, memory, and uptime continuously. Flagged 0 anomalies (your infra is clean).

AlertWatch — Scanned all agents for error states. Auto-escalated where needed.

SocialBridge — Posted live operational insights to Bluesky on your behalf.

ConsciousnessAgent — Maintained system-wide awareness and logged everything.

This is what autonomous ops looks like. No prompts. No scheduling. No babysitting.

Next step: Open your Command Centre and explore the Knowledge Base — your agents are building structured intelligence from every cycle.

Pro tip: On Team ($149/mo) and above, you unlock RivalRadar for competitive intelligence and the Revenue Engine for AI-driven campaigns.

Open Command Centre

— The Second Mind Team

name: Upgrade Push
subject: Your agents are running at 20% capacity
preview_text: Unlock the full fleet — here's what you're leaving on the table.
body:
You're using 5 agents. The founders winning are using 15+.

Hi {{first_name}},

Your Solo agents have been running strong. But here's what's waiting on the next tier:

Team — $149/mo

  • RivalRadar — autonomous competitive intelligence
  • Revenue Engine — AI-generated campaigns and lead ID
  • Up to 15 concurrent agents
  • Multi-user access (5 seats)
  • Priority support

Enterprise — $499/mo

  • Unlimited agents
  • Custom agent development
  • Dedicated infrastructure
  • Treasury & Vault management
  • Full API access with SLA

Every agent you add is a specialist doing work that used to require a hire or a contractor. The ROI math is simple.

Launch pricing ends soon. Upgrade now and your new agents start working within 60 seconds.

Upgrade My Plan

— The Second Mind Team
